description: SDXL 1.0 + Little Tinies LoRA — soft hand-drawn classic cartoon style
_comment: LoRA by alvdansen. Soft, childlike hand-drawn illustration style; research use only.
_comment_trigger: No trigger word needed. Simple subject prompts work best (e.g. 'a tiny witch child').
_comment_steps: 35–40 steps gives cleaner results than 30 for this style.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7–8 per community examples. Higher values push stylisation further.
_comment_scale: lora_scale 1.0 gives the full style; lower values (0.7–0.9) blend with the base model.
